final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "抖音直播" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2020s Chinese livestream interface design, Kuaishou/Douyin UI heritage, Chinese influencer selfie culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical format, must include livestream UI elements (viewer count, comments, gift buttons, profile bubble)
Subject: must include "神仙姐姐" as the central figure holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must be a typical Douyin livestream room setting
Lighting/mood: needs a livestream ring-light glow atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant livestream direction — exact saturation and hues are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the figure
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 9:16 vertical format
Avoid:
